title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: runc bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for runc is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The runC tool is a lightweight, portable implementation of the Open Container Format (OCF) that provides container runtime.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Bump to runc v1.2.9 or v1.3.4 to get CVE and regression fixes. [rhel-9.7.z] (JIRA:RHEL-132800)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
full_text:
An update for runc is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The runC tool is a lightweight, portable implementation of the Open Container Format (OCF) that provides container runtime.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Bump to runc v1.2.9 or v1.3.4 to get CVE and regression fixes. [rhel-9.7.z] (JIRA:RHEL-132800)
